ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is Verbal Award for PE service line.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: RecordType.Name = "Patient Engagement Opportunity" && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Verbal Award") && (ISNULL(Expected_Sign_Date__c) || ISNULL(Target_Contract_Start_Date__c) || ISNULL(Verbal_Award_Date__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Required Fields: Expected Sign Date, Target Contract Start Date, and Verbal Award Date.
